title: PolicyAllowlist
description: Protocol-owned policy allowlist artifact family. Only allowlists referenced by the active signed manifest set participate in evaluation.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for policy allowlist artifacts.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this policy allowlist.

allowlist_kind.description: Closed allowlist kind identifier enforced by runtime policy loading.

entry_schema_id.description: Typed allowlist entry schema identifier. Unknown kinds fail closed.

entries.description: Deterministic allowlist entries consumed by policy evaluation.

items.description: One typed gateway scope rule entry.
